Route Collection

Designed around Bali's most beautiful sea days

Every route can be adjusted for timing, occasion, and guest experience.

Nusa Penida

A scenic full-day yacht escape toward cliffs, blue water, and photogenic island stops.

Duration1 Day Trip

Ideal forCouples, families, content trips
TransportPrivate Yacht
Nusa Dua

Base priceFrom Rp12.500.000
Duration3-4 Hours

Ideal forSunset, proposal, birthday
TransportPrivate Yacht
Gili Trawangan

Ideal forGroups, adventure, island escape

Uluwatu

Duration5-6 Hours

Ideal forSunset lovers, photographers, surfers
